# CopilotRevive Skills Index

These skills were extracted from the reusable migration cookbooks in `CopilotRevive/cookbooks`.

---

## Obligatory Skills (Hello World — Java Update)

The following skills are **obligatory** and were generated by the `transformation.cookbooks.mapper` agent
from the project cookbooks located in `cookbooks/`. They **must** be applied to every relevant change.

| Skill file | Source cookbook | Applies to |
|------------|----------------|------------|
| `obligatory_ai-generated-comment.md` | `cookbooks/ai-generated-comment-guideline.md` | Every new file and new class |
| `obligatory_java-to-python-migration-practices.md` | `cookbooks/java-to-python-migration-good-code-practices.md` | All Java → Python migration tasks |
| `obligatory_mermaid-architecture-documentation.md` | `cookbooks/mermaid-architecture-documentation-guideline.md` | All architecture documentation changes |
